claim: Residue rank descent optimization under modular transition constraints

bounded_evidence.message: No feasible rank function exists due to cycle constraints.

counterexamples_found: Failing transition cycle observed: rank descent is impossible under linear constraints.
missing_infinite_bridge: Lifting theorem proving that any finite modular rank descent certificate implies global convergence for all integers
promotion_blocker: Lifting proof is open; also, for higher moduli, the LP constraints can become infeasible due to bad cycles
next_theorem_to_attempt: Construct an adaptive Residue-Debt Automaton with finite state ceilings to bypass bad cycles
